distinguishes.reason: Crosses STANDARD tier with the already observed 12000-cent amount while holding DAMAGED condition and inventory constant, separating a tier-driven explanation from the competing amount-at-or-above-12000 explanation.

expectedInformationGain: Maximum for one minimally redundant workflow input: it reuses the observed 12000-cent boundary and changes only customer tier relative to that trace, so the host-observed decision directly discriminates tier-driven from amount-driven explanations without introducing a new amount-boundary ambiguity.
